untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top requires multi-bar trend line identification (upper and lower diverging lines) and formation height measurement, which cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators. The pattern's core logic depends on relative positioning within a geometric structure across multiple bars, not point-in-time indicator values. Entry trigger 'fails to break out upward' and exit target calculation 'lowest low minus formation height' require structural pattern recognition beyond available indicators.
